zh.lifeSummary: 當Gijsbrecht van Amstel IJsselstein於1260年出生在荷蘭武特雷特易瑟爾斯坦時，他的父親Gijsbrecht Van Amstel IV25歲，母親Johanna van der Lede25歲。他於1280年與Bertha van Arkel結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1342年5月9日在他的家鄉享年82歲，埋葬在荷蘭武特雷特易瑟爾斯坦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gijsbrecht van Amstel IJsselstein于1260年出生在荷兰武特雷特易瑟爾斯坦时，他的父亲Gijsbrecht Van Amstel IV25岁，母亲Johanna van der Lede25岁。他于1280年与Bertha van Arkel结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1342年5月9日在他的家乡享年82岁，埋葬在荷兰武特雷特易瑟爾斯坦。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Amstel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Mayer, Pinkus.

nameMeanings.name: Gijsbrecht
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erna, Franz, Reinold, Wilhelm.

German: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements gis (from gīsil ‘pledge, hostage, noble offspring’; see Giesel ) + berht ‘bright, famous’, a cognate of Giselbert (see Gilbert ).

variants.name: Giesel
meanings: German: from the personal name Giesel, a short form of any of several ancient Germanic personal names with the first element gīsil ‘pledge, hostage, noble offspring’. In ancient and medieval ancient Germanic society, the younger children of kings and princes were sometimes sent to be brought up at the court of a neighboring ruler, as a pledge of peace between the two nations or clans. Thus, the male personal name Gisil and its feminine equivalent Gisela mean both ‘pledge’ and ‘noble offspring’.

en.lifeSummary: When Gijsbrecht van Amstel IJsselstein was born in 1260, in IJsselstein, Utrecht, Netherlands, his father, Gijsbrecht Van Amstel IV, was 25 and his mother, Johanna van der Lede, was 25. He married Bertha van Arkel in 1280. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 9 May 1342, in his hometown, at the age of 82, and was buried in IJsselstein, Utrecht, Netherlands.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gijsbrecht van Amstel IJsselstein est né en 1260, à IJsselstein, Utrecht, Pays-Bas, son père, Gijsbrecht Van Amstel IV, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Johanna van der Lede, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Bertha van Arkel en 1280. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 9 mai 1342, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterré à IJsselstein, Utrecht, Pays-Bas.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gijsbrecht van Amstel IJsselstein 1260 in IJsselstein, Utrecht, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gijsbrecht Van Amstel IV 25 und seine Mutter Johanna van der Lede 25. Er hat 1280 Bertha van Arkel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 9. Mai 1342 im Alter von 82 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in IJsselstein, Utrecht, Niederlande begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gijsbrecht van Amstel IJsselstein è nato il nel 1260 nel IJsselstein, Utrecht, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Gijsbrecht Van Amstel IV, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Johanna van der Lede, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Bertha van Arkel nel 1280. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 9 maggio 1342, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 82 anni, e fu sepolto a IJsselstein, Utrecht, Paesi Bassi.

ja.lifeSummary: Gijsbrecht van Amstel IJsselsteinが1260年にオランダウトレチトイジセルステインで生まれた時，父Gijsbrecht Van Amstel IVは25歳，母Johanna van der Ledeは25歳であった。1280年にBertha van Arkelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1342年5月9日に故郷で82歳で死去し，オランダウトレチトイジセルステインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gijsbrecht van Amstel IJsselstein(이)가 1260년 네덜란드 우트레ch트 이j셀스타인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gijsbrecht Van Amstel IV(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanna van der Lede(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1280년 Bertha van Arkel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1342년 5월 9일 그의 고향에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 네덜란드 우트레ch트 이j셀스타인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gijsbrecht van Amstel IJsselstein nasceu em 1260, em IJsselstein, Utrecht, Países Baixos, seu pai, Gijsbrecht Van Amstel IV, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Johanna van der Lede, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Bertha van Arkel em 1280. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 9 de maio de 1342, em sua cidade natal, com 82 anos, e foi sepultado em IJsselstein, Utrecht, Países Baixos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gijsbrecht van Amstel IJsselstein родился в 1260 г. в местности иджсселстин, утречт, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Gijsbrecht Van Amstel IV было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna van der Lede, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Bertha van Arkel в 1280 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 9 мая 1342 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 82 лет и был похоронен в местности иджсселстин, утречт, Нидерланды.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gijsbrecht van Amstel IJsselstein nació en 1260, en IJsselstein, Utrecht, Países Bajos, su papá, Gijsbrecht Van Amstel IV, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Johanna van der Lede, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Bertha van Arkel en 1280. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 9 de mayo de 1342, en su pueblo, a la edad de 82 años, y fue sepultado en IJsselstein, Utrecht, Países Bajos.
